item.title: KENWORTH PHANTOM v2.0 1.59-1.60.x ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

KENWORTH PHANTOM v2.0 1.59-1.60.x ETS2

Step into an alternate trucking universe with the Kenworth Phantom, one of the most distinctive custom trucks ever created for American Truck Simulator, now on Euro Truck Simulator 2. This mod combines classic American styling, futuristic details, and extensive customization options to deliver a truck that stands out from anything available in the base game.

The Phantom has been completely reworked and optimized, featuring improved performance, updated lighting systems, enhanced reflections, corrected mirrors, animated windows, refined dashboard functions, and countless visual improvements. Every detail has been carefully revised to create a smoother and more immersive driving experience.

MAIN FEATURES
Highly detailed Kenworth Phantom truck
Custom design not found in ETS2 by default
Extensive customization options
Multiple cabin & tuning accessories
Advanced lighting and lightmask system
Animated side windows
Functional dashboard and odometer
Improved mirrors and reflections
Optimized models for better FPS performance
Metallic paint support
Custom skins available
Sis’L Mega Pack compatibility for expanded cabin accessories
Clean game log and updated compatibility with recent ETS2 versions

FULL VERSION INCLUDES
All accessories unlocked
All cabin accessories options
Dual gear lever interiors
Metallic paint support
Complete skin collection
Truck available in Truck Browser
Truck available in Quick Jobs
Additional exclusive content unavailable in the Lite version
BUILT FOR TRUCKING ENTHUSIASTS

The Kenworth Phantom is designed for players who want something unique in their ETS2 garage. Whether you’re hauling freight across the deserts of Arizona, climbing the Rocky Mountains, or cruising endless highways at sunset, the Phantom delivers a commanding presence and a driving experience unlike any conventional truck. Now in Europe!!
Its blend of classic American heritage and custom styling makes it a perfect choice for screenshots, convoy sessions, roleplay, or simply enjoying the open road with a truck that turns heads everywhere it goes.

Credits: Cyrus, Traviesoman.

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

KENWORTH PHANTOM v2.0 1.59-1.60.x ETS2

Step into an alternate trucking universe with the Kenworth Phantom, one of the most distinctive custom trucks ever created for American Truck Simulator, now on Euro Truck Simulator 2. This mod combines classic American styling, futuristic details, and extensive customization options to deliver a truck that stands out from anything available in the base game.

The Phantom has been completely reworked and optimized, featuring improved performance, updated lighting systems, enhanced reflections, corrected mirrors, animated windows, refined dashboard functions, and countless visual improvements. Every detail has been carefully revised to create a smoother and more immersive driving experience.

MAIN FEATURES
Highly detailed Kenworth Phantom truck
Custom design not found in ETS2 by default
Extensive customization options
Multiple cabin & tuning accessories
Advanced lighting and lightmask system
Animated side windows
Functional dashboard and odometer
Improved mirrors and reflections
Optimized models for better FPS performance
Metallic paint support
Custom skins available
Sis’L Mega Pack compatibility for expanded cabin accessories
Clean game log and updated compatibility with recent ETS2 versions

FULL VERSION INCLUDES
All accessories unlocked
All cabin accessories options
Dual gear lever interiors
Metallic paint support
Complete skin collection
Truck available in Truck Browser
Truck available in Quick Jobs
Additional exclusive content unavailable in the Lite version
BUILT FOR TRUCKING ENTHUSIASTS

The Kenworth Phantom is designed for players who want something unique in their ETS2 garage. Whether you’re hauling freight across the deserts of Arizona, climbing the Rocky Mountains, or cruising endless highways at sunset, the Phantom delivers a commanding presence and a driving experience unlike any conventional truck. Now in Europe!!
Its blend of classic American heritage and custom styling makes it a perfect choice for screenshots, convoy sessions, roleplay, or simply enjoying the open road with a truck that turns heads everywhere it goes.

Credits: Cyrus, Traviesoman.

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Volvo S90 2020 V2.3 1.60 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Volvo S90 2020 V2.3 1.60 ETS2

CHANGELOG:
Updated to game version 1.60

Specifications:
Custom UI with digital speedometer and other information
Openable Front Windows
Wipers work accurately
Indicator, Wiper stalk and handbrake button animations
Can be attached with a compatible trailer (none included as a standard offering)
Realistic engine & transmission configuration (even the 0-100, 0-200 & 0-250 kmph timings are very close compared to the real-life counterpart)
High-quality exterior & interior
Two interior colour options (Black & Brown)

*To achieve the top speed, slot the car into the 6th gear*

FAQ:
Q: Where to purchase it?:
A: Truck Dealers > Access Mod Dealer > Volvo

Credits: DN Modding, Nimit

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Volvo S90 2020 V2.3 1.60 ETS2

CHANGELOG:
Updated to game version 1.60

Specifications:
Custom UI with digital speedometer and other information
Openable Front Windows
Wipers work accurately
Indicator, Wiper stalk and handbrake button animations
Can be attached with a compatible trailer (none included as a standard offering)
Realistic engine & transmission configuration (even the 0-100, 0-200 & 0-250 kmph timings are very close compared to the real-life counterpart)
High-quality exterior & interior
Two interior colour options (Black & Brown)

*To achieve the top speed, slot the car into the 6th gear*

FAQ:
Q: Where to purchase it?:
A: Truck Dealers > Access Mod Dealer > Volvo

Credits: DN Modding, Nimit

You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Lexus LS 500 F-Sport 2018 V2.1 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Lexus LS 500 F-Sport 2018 V2.1 ETS2

CHANGELOG:
Updated to game version 1.60

Specifications:
Very high-quality exterior & interior
Custom UI with digital speedo & functional misc information
Excellent driveability
Openable Front Windows
Wipers work accurately
Indicator and Wiper stalk, headlight switch and handbrake button animations
Realistic engine & transmission configuration (even the 0-100, 0-200 & 0-250 kmph timings are very close compared to the real-life counterpart)
Two interior colour options (Black & Brown)

*To achieve the top speed, slot the car into the 7th gear*

FAQ:
Q: Where to purchase it?:
A: Truck Dealers > Access Mod Dealer > Lexus

Credits: DN Modding, Nimit

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Lexus LS 500 F-Sport 2018 V2.1 ETS2

CHANGELOG:
Updated to game version 1.60

Specifications:
Very high-quality exterior & interior
Custom UI with digital speedo & functional misc information
Excellent driveability
Openable Front Windows
Wipers work accurately
Indicator and Wiper stalk, headlight switch and handbrake button animations
Realistic engine & transmission configuration (even the 0-100, 0-200 & 0-250 kmph timings are very close compared to the real-life counterpart)
Two interior colour options (Black & Brown)

*To achieve the top speed, slot the car into the 7th gear*

FAQ:
Q: Where to purchase it?:
A: Truck Dealers > Access Mod Dealer > Lexus

Credits: DN Modding, Nimit

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Marcopolo G7 1600 LD MB 1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Marcopolo G7 1600 LD MB 1.59 ETS2

Experience a highly detailed Marcopolo Paradiso G7 1800 DD coach with realistic modeling, improved animations, and carefully recreated details. This mod brings an authentic driving experience with a powerful Mercedes-Benz OM-457 LA engine, custom sounds, realistic lighting, detailed textures, and passenger features.

FEATURES:
Mercedes-Benz OM-457 LA engine
Realistic engine sound and effects
High-quality exterior and interior model
Detailed dashboard and cabin
Functional mirrors and windshield wipers
Working lights and realistic headlights
Improved 3D details and model accuracy
Realistic floor, cabin and seat textures
Custom curtain textures
Passenger system included
Multiple custom skins and liveries
Custom destination signs and windshield plates
Smooth animations and realistic bus details

Credits: Norman Rodrigues, Julio Cesar, TitiGameplay, Bernardo Andrade, Lucas Pinheiro, Enzo Caldeirini, Cristhian Cardoso,Pedro Bolivia, Thomas Povaluk & Henrique Araujo

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Marcopolo G7 1600 LD MB 1.59 ETS2

Experience a highly detailed Marcopolo Paradiso G7 1800 DD coach with realistic modeling, improved animations, and carefully recreated details. This mod brings an authentic driving experience with a powerful Mercedes-Benz OM-457 LA engine, custom sounds, realistic lighting, detailed textures, and passenger features.

FEATURES:
Mercedes-Benz OM-457 LA engine
Realistic engine sound and effects
High-quality exterior and interior model
Detailed dashboard and cabin

Improved 3D details and model accuracy
Realistic floor, cabin and seat textures
Custom curtain textures
Passenger system included
Multiple custom skins and liveries

Credits: Norman Rodrigues, Julio Cesar, TitiGameplay, Bernardo Andrade, Lucas Pinheiro, Enzo Caldeirini, Cristhian Cardoso,Pedro Bolivia, Thomas Povaluk & Henrique Araujo

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Marcopolo New G7 Paradiso 1200 Multichassi 1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Marcopolo New G7 Paradiso 1200 Multichassi 1.59 ETS2

Experience the legendary Marcopolo New G7 1200, a premium coach designed to bring a realistic and immersive driving experience to Euro Truck Simulator 2.
Built with great attention to detail, this bus features a modern aerodynamic body, a high-quality 3D model, and a beautifully recreated interior. The stylish exterior design, detailed front grille, realistic LED lighting, and large panoramic windshield deliver an authentic coach driving atmosphere.
The Multichassis system offers extended customization options, allowing players to configure the bus for different routes and driving styles. With realistic handling, multiple tuning options, custom sounds, passenger support, and detailed animations, the Marcopolo New G7 1200 is an excellent addition for every ETS2 bus enthusiast.

FEATURES:
Standalone high-quality bus model
Detailed exterior and interior design
Realistic driver cabin
Custom interior with detailed textures
Realistic engine sounds
Own wheels and rims
Passenger seats included
Passenger transportation support
Multiple chassis options
Choice of engines and power configurations
Choice of transmissions and gearboxes
Custom wheels and rim options
Body color selection
Metallic paint support
Multiple skins/liveries
Correct Marcopolo logo placement
Functional dashboard indicators
Illuminated speedometer and tachometer
Correct driver position
Realistic steering wheel animation
Working mirrors
Working windshield animations
Interior and exterior animations
Fully functional headlights
Brake lights and tail lights
Front and rear turn signals
Reverse lights support
Baggage compartment functionality
Exterior tuning parts available
Supports all major ETS2 features
Available at the Access Mod Dealer
A complete and highly detailed Marcopolo coach mod created for players who enjoy realistic long-distance bus driving.

Credits: Norman Rodrigues, Julio Cesar, TitiGameplay, Bernardo Andrade, Lucas Souza, Enzo Caldeirini, Cristhian Cardoso, Thomas Povaluk, Henrique Araujo

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
item.content:encoded:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | June 4, 2026

Marcopolo New G7 Paradiso 1200 Multichassi 1.59 ETS2

Experience the legendary Marcopolo New G7 1200, a premium coach designed to bring a realistic and immersive driving experience to Euro Truck Simulator 2.
Built with great attention to detail, this bus features a modern aerodynamic body, a high-quality 3D model, and a beautifully recreated interior. The stylish exterior design, detailed front grille, realistic LED lighting, and large panoramic windshield deliver an authentic coach driving atmosphere.
The Multichassis system offers extended customization options, allowing players to configure the bus for different routes and driving styles. With realistic handling, multiple tuning options, custom sounds, passenger support, and detailed animations, the Marcopolo New G7 1200 is an excellent addition for every ETS2 bus enthusiast.

FEATURES:
Standalone high-quality bus model
Detailed exterior and interior design
Realistic driver cabin
Custom interior with detailed textures
Realistic engine sounds
Own wheels and rims
Passenger seats included
Passenger transportation support
Multiple chassis options
Choice of engines and power configurations

Custom wheels and rim options
Body color selection
Metallic paint support
Multiple skins/liveries
Correct Marcopolo logo placement
Functional dashboard indicators
Illuminated speedometer and tachometer
Correct driver position
Realistic steering wheel animation
Working mirrors
Working windshield animations
Interior and exterior animations
Fully functional headlights
Brake lights and tail lights
Front and rear turn signals
Reverse lights support
Baggage compartment functionality
Exterior tuning parts available
Supports all major ETS2 features
Available at the Access Mod Dealer
A complete and highly detailed Marcopolo coach mod created for players who enjoy realistic long-distance bus driving.

Credits: Norman Rodrigues, Julio Cesar, TitiGameplay, Bernardo Andrade, Lucas Souza, Enzo Caldeirini, Cristhian Cardoso, Thomas Povaluk, Henrique Araujo

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.
